sloka_995.meaning: I am the fruit of action

sloka_980.meaning: in this pure life of devotion for Me
on the path of death in the material world

sloka_990.meaning: as the origin of all that be

sloka_1010.meaning: will surely attain the supreme destination

sloka_1003.meaning: partake of that – I affectionately accept

sloka_993.meaning: I am the act of offering
I am the fire sacrifices Agniṣṭoma, Atyāgniṣṭoma, Uktha, Ṣoḍaśi, Atirātra, Aptoryāma and Vājapeya, collectively known as Jyotiṣṭoma
I am the obsequial oblation offered to the ancestors
I am the five types of sacrifices to demigod deities such as the Viśvadevas and others according to the smṛti scriptures
I am the ghee (clarified butter) and other sacrificial ingredients

sloka_994.meaning: the ordainer of the living beings’ fruits of actions

sloka_1007.meaning: with exclusive devotion (giving up all other endeavours such as karma and jñān)

sloka_1000.meaning: but not in a way appropriate to attaining Me

sloka_978.meaning: from inauspiciousness, or, from all that is opposed to devotion
knowledge of pure devotion for Me (singing My glories which expands into unlimited services)
up to direct realisation of Me

sloka_988.meaning: the Supreme Lord of all beings
of My form of human features

sloka_997.meaning: who take the remnants of soma-rasa, a beverage made from the soma creeper, dear to the demigods
to attain the heavenly plane, the abode of the demigods
Performers of the fruitive rituals of the Ṛg-, Yajur- and Sāma-vedas
by sacrifice, but indirectly through the demigods

sloka_991.meaning: and unfailingly following the devotional observances such as Ekādaśī and regular chanting of the Holy Name
singing the glories of My divine Name, form, etc
offering obeisances unto Me and following all the practices of devotion
earnestly aspiring for their eternal relationship with Me
At all times, in all places and circumstances
striving to learn spiritual truths of My transcendental nature, personality, etc

sloka_992.meaning: Viṣṇu, but in the form of demigods, conscious of differentiation
as the cosmic or universal form

sloka_998.meaning: coming and going in this world
with the exhaustion of their peity
the worship prescribed in three of the Vedas

sloka_984.meaning: With a new day of Brahmā

sloka_1005.meaning: With mind linked to Me by renouncing the fruits of your actions

sloka_981.meaning: are situated in Me, the infinite

sloka_999.meaning: who are exclusively devoted to Me
the responsibility of providing and protecting the necessities

sloka_986.meaning: those actions of manifestation, sustenance, and withdrawal
